LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SHIRA SHAVIT'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL AND COUNSEL'S LAW FIRM IS DENIED. DR. SHAVIT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT THERE IS A SUBSTANTIAL RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE O'CONNELL ACTION AND THIS CASE. MOREOVER, THE UNDISPUTED EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRIVY TO ANY INFORMATION FROM THE O'CONNELL ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SHIRA SHAVIT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Set For Trial On Mar-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Julia Hansen, Esq., of Hassard Bonnington LLP, Tel. 415.288.9800, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Jonathan M. Shugart, Esq., of the Law Offices of David Andersen, Tel. 415.395.9898, appearing for Plaintiff.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested by either party. DEFENDANT SHIRA SHAVIT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Disqualify Pltfs' Counsel And Counsel'S Law Firm
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Julia Hansen, Esq., of Hassard Bonnington LLP, Tel. 415.288.9800, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Jonathan M. Shugart, Esq., of the Law Offices of David Andersen, Tel. 415.395.9898, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested by either party. DEFENDANT SHIRA SHAVIT's Motion To Disqualify Plaintiffs' Counsel And Counsel's Law Firm is Denied. Dr. Shavit has not shown that there is a substantial relationship between the O'Connell action and this case. Moreover, the undisputed evidence shows that counsel for plaintiff was not privy to any information from the O'Connell action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
